Rule.name: SP_BNPPF-ResetWorkgroupPasswords
Rule.Description: Resets the IIQ native login password for all members of workgroup "BNPPF SailPoint Implementer" to P@s5word# and forces change at next logon.

Rule.name: Rule-ResetWorkgroupPasswords
Rule.Description: Resets the IIQ native login password for all members of a specified workgroup to a temporary value and sets the mustResetPassword flag to force change at next logon.

TaskDefinition.name: Task-ResetWorkgroupPasswords
TaskDefinition.Description: Resets IIQ native login passwords for all members of a specified workgroup and forces change at next logon. Configure workgroupName and tempPassword before running.
